response.step_by_step_log: The video features a performance of "dahlah." by Kaela Kovalskia, with Kobo Kanaeru and Vestia Zeta as additional performers. Lyrics were identified through search and the song title "dahlah." by Kaela Kovalskia was confirmed. Search strings used: "dahlah." Kaela Kovalskia Indonesian and English lyrics. The second segment (03:05 - 05:01) is dialogue, not a vocal song.
response.global_summary: A live performance segment by Hololive Indonesia members Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Vestia Zeta, followed by an MC/introduction segment celebrating their 5th anniversary.

scenes.description: Performance of "dahlah." by Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Vestia Zeta.
